_comment_profile: Perfil para Cognion: Clean Architecture BC-first con FastAPI

profile_metadata.name: clean-architecture-bc
profile_metadata.description: Monolito modular con Clean Architecture: entities → use_cases → interface_adapters → frameworks, organizado por Bounded Context.
profile_metadata.author: Víctor Valotto
profile_metadata.architecture: Clean Architecture BC-First (entities → use_cases → interface_adapters → frameworks)

architecture_pattern.description: Clean Architecture BC-first: entities → use_cases → interface_adapters → frameworks

layers.entities: Reglas de negocio puras — Aggregates, Entities, ValueObjects, DomainEvents, puertos (interfaces). Sin dependencias externas.
layers.use_cases: Orquestación de la aplicación — Use Cases, Commands, Queries. Solo importa entities/.
layers.interface_adapters: Controllers (FastAPI routers), Presenters, Gateways. Solo importa use_cases/.
layers.frameworks: Implementaciones concretas — SQLAlchemy repos, WebSockets, email adapters. Implementa puertos definidos en entities/.

architecture_pattern.golden_rule: Las capas internas nunca importan capas externas. Entre BCs: solo por puertos en entities/ports/. shared/entities/ es la única excepción transversal.

component_type.description: Tipo de componente de Clean Architecture a implementar

component_path.description: Ruta base según tipo de componente y BC

by_component.Repository: class que implementa el Port correspondiente

naming.ports: PascalCase con sufijo Repository o Service — SesionRepository (interface)

conventions.commit_scopes: entities | use_cases | interface_adapters | frameworks | frontend | cm | tests | design
